sentences.english: I had a cat when I was a child.
He was mostly black with white paws.
He lived to be seventeen years old which is quite old for a cat.
sentences.korean: 17살까지 살았는데 고양이치고는 꽤 오래 산 거예요.

quiz.question: What does '~을 돌보다, 보살피다' mean in English?

sentences.english: My favorite animal is definitely a dog.
sentences.korean: 제가 가장 좋아하는 동물은 확실히 개예요.

sentences.english: I can relate to dogs because I share similar characteristics such as being friendly, lovable, loyal and cute.
sentences.korean: 개에게 공감할 수 있어요. 친절하고 사랑스럽고 충성스럽고 귀여운 비슷한 특성을 공유하거든요.

sentences.english: Dogs can do so many things to help make a person feel good.
sentences.korean: 개는 사람을 기분 좋게 하기 위해 정말 많은 걸 할 수 있어요.

sentences.english: My favorite animal is a cat.

quiz.question: What does '얻다, 획득하다' mean in English?

sentences.english: Two years ago I acquired a cat.
My favorite animal to live with is a cat.
sentences.korean: 함께 살기에 가장 좋아하는 동물은 고양이예요.

sentences.english: They take good care of themselves and they're easy to look after.
I recently saw a movie called The March of the Penguins.
I suddenly have a very big appreciation for penguins.
sentences.korean: 갑자기 펭귄에 대한 큰 감사함이 생겼어요.

sentences.english: The animal that I think is most interesting is the wolf.
sentences.korean: 제가 생각하기에 가장 흥미로운 동물은 늑대예요.

sentences.english: I grew up in Minnesota and Minnesota has the only native wolf population in the US.
sentences.korean: 미네소타에서 자랐는데, 미네소타에는 미국에서 유일한 야생 늑대 집단이 있어요.

quiz.question: What does '~에 공감하다, 관련짓다' mean in English?
